arts.ttl: ‘Even if we don’t have the biggest names…’ – Marquinhos happy with PSG’s collective shift following Kylian Mbappé departure
arts.sum: The project has evolved at Paris Saint-Germain since Luis Enrique’s arrival. In his first summer, both Lionel Messi and Neymar left the club; one year later, Kylian Mbappé followed them…
